title: Swap address bits in packed slot using XOR without masking upper bits
description: xor(packed, xor(from, to)) flips exactly the bits that differ between from and to in the lower 160 bits. Since from and to are clean 160-bit addresses, their XOR only has bits set in the lower 160 positions — the upper 96 extraData bits are never touched. No masking constant needed.
pattern_after:
// XOR swap — upper bits untouched automatically
sstore(ownershipSlot, xor(ownershipPacked, xor(from, to)))
when_to_apply: Replacing an address in the lower 160 bits of a packed slot when upper bits must be preserved
when_not_to_apply: When from or to might have dirty upper bits (always clean with shr(96, shl(96, addr)) first)
